# GitHub Repository Settings

## Repository Name
luoboask/evo-agents

## Description (English)
Unified Memory System for OpenClaw — Markdown + SQLite bidirectional sync, semantic search with local Ollama, zero external API keys.

## Description (Chinese)
OpenClaw 统一记忆系统 — Markdown + SQLite 双向同步，本地 Ollama 语义搜索，无需外部 API Key。

## Topics / Tags
openclaw, memory-system, agent, ai-memory, semantic-search, sqlite, markdown, ollama, bge-m3, fts5, chinese-nlp, local-ai

## Website
https://github.com/luoboask/evo-agents

## Social Preview
(建议上传一张 1280×640 的封面图，展示系统架构或特性)

## Features
✅ Markdown ↔ SQLite bidirectional bridge
✅ Semantic search with bge-m3 (local Ollama)
✅ FTS5 Chinese full-text search
✅ Smart importance scoring
✅ Auto compression (daily → weekly → monthly)
✅ Concurrency safe (fcntl + WAL)
✅ One-click install
✅ Zero external API keys

## Default Branch
master

## Features to Enable
- [x] Issues
- [x] Pull Requests
- [x] Discussions (optional)
- [ ] Wikis (not needed, docs in repo)
- [ ] Projects (optional)

## Branch Protection (for master)
- Require pull request reviews before merging
- Require status checks to pass before merging
- Include administrators

## GitHub Pages (optional)
Can publish docs/ folder for documentation site
